message:
feat: support .no-sync marker file to skip databases during sync (#3128)

Databases with a `.no-sync` file in their data directory are skipped
by both SyncDatabases and SyncDatabasesSQL. This prevents the
auto-provisioning logic from creating DoltHub repos and pushing
local-only databases that should never leave the machine.

Use case: rigs whose beads databases are intentionally local-only
(e.g., personal/experimental projects).

Co-Authored-By: Sean Bearden <72461227+seanbearden@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
